description: Update dashboard to show new strategy info (market filter, EMA distance, swing SL, breakeven, candle close, reversal) and remove old unused info (Named Pipe, Trail Tier, EMA crossover label)
steps: 1. Add new global variables in NeuroX_Types.mqh for choppy_votes, swing_sl, breakeven_status, reversal_status
2. Update bridge.py write_intelligence() to accept and write new fields (choppy_votes, swing_sl, breakeven_status, reversal_status)
3. Update main.py to compute and pass the new fields to write_intelligence()
4. Update ReadIntelligenceFile() in NeuroX_Execution.mqh to parse the new fields
5. Update NeuroX_Dashboard.mqh: remove Named Pipe row, remove Trail Tier row, replace EMA crossover with new strategy rows (Market Filter, EMA Distance, Swing SL, Breakeven, Candle Close, Reversal)
6. Update tests for write_intelligence() to verify new fields
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows Market Filter with voting counts
Dashboard shows EMA Distance from EMA 9
Dashboard shows Candle Close time remaining
Named Pipe row removed from dashboard
Trail Tier row removed from dashboard
Old EMA crossover label replaced with price vs EMA9 info
Python tests pass with new intelligence fields
